docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-11-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LANZ PASCUAL. DEFENDANT JOSHUAH GENTRY DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-17-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GENTRY, JOSHUAH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED FEB-10-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GENTRY, JOSHUAH
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PASCUAL, LANZ AS TO DEFENDANT GENTRY, JOSHUAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LANZ PASCUAL. DEFENDANT JOSHUAH GENTRY DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASCUAL, LANZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENTRY, JOSHUAH $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PASCUAL, LANZ
